variants.text: You came back. Most don't, after I tell them about the blank verifier fields. Either you forgot, or you're the stubborn kind. ...I hope you're the stubborn kind.
Keeper. K-902 reopened, I see. That file was empty for years and now it isn't. Files don't refill themselves. Someone's writing into it.

refill.speaker: Vasic
refill.text: Officially? Reconstruction recovers degraded data. Unofficially — I've watched records change while no Keeper was assigned. Eden's correction layer. It writes the version it prefers and calls it recovery. I'd file a complaint, but the complaint form keeps getting corrected too.

variants.text: Of course I'm nervous. The containment protocols are running hotter every cycle. Last week a clerk two desks down got 'reconciled.' Now there's no clerk two desks down, and no desk, and I'm the only one who remembers there was. ...You believe me. Good. I needed someone to.
Just tired. The reopened cases make more work. Forget it.

bye.speaker: Vasic
bye.text: Watch the files that fill themselves, Keeper. Those are the ones with someone behind them.
